creator: gosha-necr@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #1)

Thanks Tobias for detailed review for my patch. This is my first attempt of creating port.

About "CONFLICTS" section, I have it in such line:
XCONFLICTS=	tesseract-3.*

But, as I understand, variant:
CONFLICTS=      tesseract-[0-9]*

will be more common. When appears stable version of tesseract and in ports tree will be tesseract-3.x, tesseract-4.x and tesseract-devel, such variant of CONFLICTS will be robust.

About other notices I will try fix it and skill up mu ports knowledge :)
